summary: Alibaba announces Qwen 3.8, a 2.4 trillion-parameter open-weight model, second only to Fable 5
Thinking Machines Lab launches Inkling, a 975B parameter open-weight AI model with DeepSeek-inspired design
Palistor releases an experimental AI-friendly MVVM framework for React, enabling client-side rendering and semantic search
T-Tech open-sources T-Search, a high-performance agentic retriever for multi-step search tasks, running on a single GPU
Perplexity AI releases WANDR, an open benchmark for evaluating research agents that must search wide and deep
Aether-7B-5Attn, a 100% open-source sovereign foundation model, is released
VideoChat3, a 4-billion-parameter video understanding model, is released
Alibaba debuts Qwen3.8 Max, a 2.4 trillion-parameter AI model with upcoming open-weight release for developers
Alibaba open-sources SAIL stack, a software architecture for its Zhenwu AI processors, as an alternative to NVIDIA's CUDA
Composio releases integrations for Hermes and Claude Cowork agent frameworks, enabling local LLM runner and Hugging Face model support
Moonshot AI releases Kimi K3, the world's largest open AI model with 2.8 trillion parameters
Google DeepMind releases Gemini 3.5 Pro with 2-million-token context window and new Deep Think reasoning mode
SpaceXAI launches Grok 4.5 with aggressive API pricing and immediate availability
Ledger releases an open-source AI toolkit with hardware-enforced approval for crypto transactions, enabling secure AI agent management
NVIDIA releases Nemotron 3 Embed, an open embedding model collection with 8B and 1B variants for retrieval and agentic workflows
NVIDIA releases BioNeMo Agent Toolkit, accelerating AI for life sciences researchers with Claude Science integration
Roblox launches Build, a mobile-first creation tab with AI-powered tools
Sierra announces Horizon, a platform for agents to pursue long-horizon goals
Functionize launches Studio, a quality platform with adversarial agents
Thinking Machines Lab releases Inkling, a 975 billion-parameter open-weights multimodal AI model for customizable AI development
Anthropic Labs launches Claude Design, a visual collaboration tool
Oracle introduces AI-native builder experience for Oracle Fusion Applications
Meta releases FastText-lmo-vectors, efficient and lightweight word embeddings for natural language processing
JoshuaC215 releases an open-source agent service toolkit for running AI agent services with LangGraph, FastAPI, and Streamlit
Kastor releases a tool for defining AI agents in HCL, enabling infrastructure-as-code habits for AI agent development
Ternlight releases a 7MB embedding model that runs entirely in the browser, enabling client-side semantic search
